name: Guangxi Hechi Chemical Co., Ltd
summary: Guangxi Hechi Chemical Co., Ltd produces and sells fertilizers in China. Its products include urea, compound fertilizers, liquid carbon dioxide, and methanol, as well as ammonia and sulfur. The company was formerly known as Guangxi Hechi Nitrogen Fertilizer Plant. Guangxi Hechi Chemical Co., Ltd was founded in 1969 and is based in Hechi, China.
